sourcesContent:
function Star({ filled, half}) 
{
  return(
  <svg
    width="24"
    height="24"
    viewBox="0 0 24 24"
  >
     <defs>
      <clipPath id="half">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="12" height="24" />
      </clipPath>
    </defs>

    <polygon
      points="12 2 15.09 8.26 22 9.27 17 14.14 
              18.18 21.02 12 17.77 5.82 21.02 
              7 14.14 2 9.27 8.91 8.26 12 2"
      fill={filled ? "gold" : half ? "url(#half-fill)" : "none"}
      stroke="gold"
      strokeWidth="1"
      strokeLinejoin="round"
      strokeLinecap="round"
    />

    {half && (
      <polygon
        points="12 2 15.09 8.26 22 9.27 17 14.14 
                18.18 21.02 12 17.77 5.82 21.02 
                7 14.14 2 9.27 8.91 8.26 12 2"
        fill="gold"
        clipPath="url(#half)"
      />
    )}
  </svg>
  )
};

export default Star;
